rulings.Case Title: ALVIN RATLIFF VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, APRIL 18, 2008 LINE 3. DEFENDANT FOSTER WHEELER, L.L.C.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S DEVOID DISCOVERY AND DEFENDANT'S EVIDENCE AS TO THE AGE OF THE SHIP AND THE WORK DONE ON THE SHIP. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE FAILS TO CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AND DOES NOT SUPPORT THE ASSERTION THAT DEFENDANT SOLD REPLACEMENT PARTS THAT WERE PLACED ON DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS ON THE CONSTELLATION. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: JUDITH ANN ARBALLO VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, APRIL 18, 2008 LINE 19. DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT'S UNDISPUTED FACTS TEN AND ELEVEN ARE NOT SUPPORTED BY ADMISSIBLE OR PROBATIVE EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO MEYER DECLARATION 3-25-03 ARE OVERRULED AND TO THE MEYER DECLARATION 7-29-05 ARE SUSTAINED. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION TO HAMILTON INTERROGATORY RESPONSES IS SUSTAINED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF ON THE ISSUES OF FALSE REPRESENTATION AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED EVIDENCE OF TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED ON THOSE CLAIMS AND DENIED AS TO THE OTHERS FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: MARSHA LEE-HARRISON VS. MILLS BUILDING THE SWIG COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, APRIL 18, 2008 LINE 6. CROSS-COMPLAINANTS THE MILLS BUILDING AND THE SWIG COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE MOTION DOES NOT COMPLETELY DISPOSE OF THE BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM BECAUSE THE ISSUE OF DAMAGES HAS NOT BEEN ESTABLISHED AS REFLECTED IN FACT 12. THERE ALSO IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO WHETHER SENTINEL NEGLIGENTLY PERFORMED OR FAILED TO PERFORM ITS OBLIGATIONS. =(302/PJM/PB)

THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: NATACHA CONTRERAS et al VS. JAMIE LEE et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, APRIL 18, 2008 LINE 13. DEFENDANT JAMIE LEE'S DEMURRER IS OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE DEFAULT IS CONCLUSIVE ONLY ON ISSUES SPECIFICALLY RAISED. THE COMPLAINT IN THIS CASE ALLEGES OTHER WRONGFUL ACTS. THE SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF ON THE FOURTH AND SEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION WHICH ARE CENTERED ON HABITABILITY ISSUES. THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION REFERS TO ACTS TO RECOVER POSSESSION AND NECESSARILY INCLUDES PETITIONING ACTIVITY. THE DECLARATIONS OF PLAINTIFFS MAKE OUT A PRIMA FACIE CASE AND THE VAST MAJORITY OF THE CONDUCT ON WHICH CAUSE OF ACTION IS BASED IS NOT PROTECTED BY THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. =(302/PJM/AY)
